name: Deel
shortDescription: Integration with Deel's global HR, payroll, and contracting platform. Manage people and HRIS data, contractor (IC) and EOR contracts, time off, adjustments, off-cycle payments, global payroll, applicant tracking (ATS), immigration, screenings, IT assets, and invoices through a single OAuth2-connected service. Connects to either the Production or Sandbox (demo) environment.

actions.name: Test Connection
actions.description: Confirms that the service can reach Deel with the connected account. Run this once after connecting to verify the setup. Returns your name, email, and organization so you can confirm the right account is linked.

actions.name: Get My Profile
actions.description: Returns the Deel profile of the currently connected user. Useful to verify identity, fetch your worker ID, or display your name in flows.

actions.name: Get Organization
actions.description: Returns details about your Deel organization. Use this to fetch your org name, ID, and the country it operates from for use in other flows.

actions.name: List People
actions.description: Returns the list of people (workers, employees, contractors) in your Deel organization. Filter by status, country, or type, or search by name/email.

actions.name: Get Person
actions.description: Returns the full profile of one person in your Deel organization. Pick by their Deel ID or by an external ID from your own system.

actions.name: Update Person
actions.description: Updates a person's profile information (name, email, phone, etc.). Only fields you fill in will be updated.

actions.name: Update Working Location
actions.description: Updates the country and city where the person is currently working. Used for tax, compliance, and benefits calculations.

actions.name: Create Person Without Contract
actions.description: Adds a new person to Deel without immediately creating a contract. Useful for pre-onboarding workflows where you collect data before signing.

actions.name: Create Direct Employee
actions.description: Creates a direct employee record (you employ them, not Deel). For EOR-managed employees use Create EOR Worker.

actions.name: List Org Structure
actions.description: Returns your organization's structure (teams, departments, hierarchies) configured in Deel.

actions.name: Get Org Structure Node
actions.description: Returns one node (team or department) from your org structure.

actions.name: Create Org Structure Node
actions.description: Creates a new team or department in your org structure.

actions.name: Update Org Structure Node
actions.description: Updates a team or department's name or parent.

actions.name: Delete Org Structure Node
actions.description: Removes a team or department from your org structure. Children will be reassigned to the parent.

actions.name: Get Custom Fields
actions.description: Returns the custom fields defined on a person, contract, or organization. Use this to discover what data is being tracked.

actions.name: Set Custom Field
actions.description: Sets the value of a custom field on a person or contract. Creates the value if it doesn't exist, updates it if it does.

actions.name: Delete Custom Field Value
actions.description: Clears a custom field's value on a person or contract.

actions.name: List Worker Relations
actions.description: Returns the management and reporting relationships for a person (manager, direct reports, mentors, etc.).

actions.name: List Contracts
actions.description: Returns the list of contracts in your Deel organization. Filter by status, country, or type to narrow the list, or look up by external ID.

actions.name: Get Contract
actions.description: Returns the full details of one contract.

actions.name: Create Contractor Contract
actions.description: Creates a new contractor (IC) agreement in Deel. The worker will receive an invitation to review and sign.

actions.name: Send Contract to Worker
actions.description: Sends the contract to the worker for review and signature. Required step before the contract becomes active.

actions.name: Sign Contract
actions.description: Signs a contract on behalf of the client (your organization). Confirms the agreement and triggers worker invitation.

actions.name: Preview Contract Agreement
actions.description: Returns a preview of the contract PDF as a URL or base64 string. Useful for letting workers review before sending.

actions.name: Get Worker Invite Link
actions.description: Returns the URL the worker can use to access their Deel onboarding/signing page. Useful for re-sending invitations.

actions.name: Remove Worker Invite
actions.description: Revokes the worker invitation. Useful if the wrong person was invited or details need correcting.

actions.name: Terminate Contract
actions.description: Initiates termination of a contract. Specify the reason and last working day.

actions.name: Amend Contract
actions.description: Creates a contract amendment (e.g., pay raise, role change, scope update). Worker may need to sign depending on the field changed.

actions.name: List Amendments
actions.description: Returns all amendments for a contract.

actions.name: List Milestones
actions.description: Returns all milestones for a milestone-based contract.

actions.name: Create Milestone
actions.description: Adds a new milestone to a milestone-based contract.

actions.name: Delete Milestone
actions.description: Removes a milestone (only if it hasn't been approved yet).

actions.name: List Tasks
actions.description: Returns tasks (pay-as-you-go items) submitted on a contract.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Adds a billable task to a pay-as-you-go contract.

actions.name: Review Task
actions.description: Approves or rejects a contractor task before payment.

actions.name: List Timesheets
actions.description: Returns timesheet entries. Filter by contract or date range.

actions.name: Create Timesheet Entry
actions.description: Logs an hourly/daily timesheet entry on a contract.

actions.name: Update Timesheet Entry
actions.description: Updates the quantity, date, or description of a timesheet entry.

actions.name: Delete Timesheet Entry
actions.description: Removes a timesheet entry.

actions.name: Review Timesheet
actions.description: Approves or rejects a timesheet entry before payment.

actions.name: List Invoice Adjustments
actions.description: Returns bonuses, deductions, and reimbursements queued for a contractor's next invoice.

actions.name: Create Invoice Adjustment
actions.description: Adds a bonus, deduction, or reimbursement to a contractor's upcoming invoice.

actions.name: Delete Invoice Adjustment
actions.description: Removes a pending invoice adjustment before it's billed.

actions.name: Review Invoice Adjustment
actions.description: Approves or rejects a pending invoice adjustment.

actions.name: List Off-Cycle Payments
actions.description: Returns one-off payments made to a contractor outside their normal schedule.

actions.name: Create Off-Cycle Payment
actions.description: Sends a one-off payment to a contractor outside their normal pay schedule.

actions.name: Calculate Employee Cost
actions.description: Estimates the total cost (salary + employer taxes + Deel fees + benefits) of hiring an employee through Deel EOR in a given country.

actions.name: Get Hiring Guide
actions.description: Returns Deel's detailed hiring guide for a country — including required benefits, notice periods, leave, and typical compensation.

actions.name: Get EOR Start Date
actions.description: Returns the earliest possible start date for a new EOR employee in a country — accounting for visa, background check, and onboarding lead times.

actions.name: List EOR Benefits
actions.description: Returns the benefits enrolled on an EOR contract (health, retirement, etc.).

actions.name: List Job Scope Templates
actions.description: Returns Deel's predefined and custom job-scope templates for EOR contracts.

actions.name: Validate Job Scope
actions.description: Checks whether a draft job scope meets Deel's compliance standards for a country before creating the contract.

actions.name: Create EOR Contract
actions.description: Creates a new EOR (Employer of Record) employment contract. Deel hires the worker on your behalf in the destination country.

actions.name: Accept EOR Quote
actions.description: Accepts the cost quote for an EOR contract, moving it to the signing phase.

actions.name: Sign EOR Contract
actions.description: Signs the EOR employment contract as the client. After signing, Deel begins onboarding the employee.

actions.name: Cancel EOR Contract
actions.description: Cancels an EOR contract that hasn't started yet (e.g., before the employee starts).

actions.name: Delay EOR Onboarding
actions.description: Pushes the EOR employee's start date later. Useful when the employee isn't ready to start as originally planned.

actions.name: Fetch EOR Contract Document
actions.description: Returns the EOR contract's signed PDF document as a download URL.

actions.name: Request EOR Termination
actions.description: Initiates the offboarding process for an EOR employee. Deel handles the legal termination steps for the country.

actions.name: Get Termination Details
actions.description: Returns details of an in-progress EOR termination request.

actions.name: List EOR Payslips
actions.description: Returns the payslip records for an EOR employee.

actions.name: Download Payslip PDF
actions.description: Returns a download URL for a single EOR payslip PDF.

actions.name: List Employee Compliance Documents
actions.description: Returns the compliance documents (NDAs, IP assignments, country-required forms) requested from an EOR employee.

actions.name: List Time Off Requests
actions.description: Returns time-off requests across your org. Filter by person, status, or date range.

actions.name: Create Time Off Request
actions.description: Submits a new time-off request on behalf of a person.

actions.name: Update Time Off Request
actions.description: Edits a pending time-off request — change dates, type, or reason.

actions.name: Cancel Time Off Request
actions.description: Cancels a pending or approved time-off request.

actions.name: Review Time Off Request
actions.description: Approves or rejects a pending time-off request.

actions.name: Validate Time Off Request
actions.description: Checks whether a time-off request would be valid (within policy, no conflicts, sufficient balance) WITHOUT actually submitting it.

actions.name: List Time Off Policies
actions.description: Returns the time-off policies assigned to a person (allowed types, accrual rules, balances).

actions.name: Get Entitlements
actions.description: Returns the time-off balances and entitlements for a person — how many days they've used and how many remain.

actions.name: Get Work Schedule and Holidays
actions.description: Returns the person's working hours, weekly schedule, and applicable public holidays for their country.

actions.name: List Adjustments
actions.description: Returns adjustments (bonuses, deductions, reimbursements) applied to a contract's payroll.

actions.name: Get Adjustment
actions.description: Returns the full details of one adjustment.

actions.name: Create Adjustment
actions.description: Adds a one-off bonus, deduction, or reimbursement to an employee's payroll. Deel requires a supporting file (receipt, approval, etc.) on every adjustment.

actions.name: Update Adjustment
actions.description: Edits a pending adjustment before it's applied to payroll.

actions.name: Delete Adjustment
actions.description: Removes a pending adjustment before it's applied.

actions.name: List GP Employees
actions.description: Returns the list of Global Payroll employees in your organization, optionally filtered by legal entity.

actions.name: Update GP Employee Information
actions.description: Updates the GP employee's profile data (name, contact info, identifiers).

actions.name: Update GP Compensation
actions.description: Updates the compensation (salary, bonus structure) for a Global Payroll employee.

actions.name: Update GP Address
actions.description: Updates the home address of a Global Payroll employee.

actions.name: Request GP Termination
actions.description: Initiates the offboarding process for a Global Payroll employee.

actions.name: List Payroll Cycles
actions.description: Returns the payroll cycles (monthly pay runs) for a legal entity.

actions.name: Get Gross to Net Report
actions.description: Returns the gross-to-net breakdown for a payroll cycle (salary, taxes, deductions, net pay per employee).

actions.name: List Shifts
actions.description: Returns time-tracking shifts for a contract or globally.

actions.name: Create Shifts
actions.description: Creates one or more time-tracking shifts in a single call. Provide a JSON array of shift objects. The contract must have a configured shift rate (its external ID goes in each shift's summary).

actions.name: Delete Shift
actions.description: Removes a single time-tracking shift.

actions.name: List GP Payslips
actions.description: Returns payslip records for a Global Payroll worker.

actions.name: List Jobs
actions.description: Returns the jobs (open positions) in your Deel Applicant Tracking System.

actions.name: Get Job
actions.description: Returns details of one job posting.

actions.name: Create Job
actions.description: Creates a new job opening in your ATS.

actions.name: List Candidates
actions.description: Returns candidates in your ATS. Filter by stage, job, or search by name/email.

actions.name: Create Candidate
actions.description: Adds a new candidate to your ATS database.

actions.name: Add Candidate Tags
actions.description: Adds one or more tags to a candidate for filtering and organization.

actions.name: List Applications
actions.description: Returns applications (candidate-to-job submissions). Filter by job, candidate, or stage.

actions.name: Get Application
actions.description: Returns the full details of one application, including stage history and notes.

actions.name: Create Application
actions.description: Submits a candidate to a job, creating a new application.

actions.name: Add Application Note
actions.description: Adds a private note (interview feedback, comment) to an application.

actions.name: Move Application to Stage
actions.description: Moves an application to a new interview stage (e.g., Phone Screen → Onsite → Offer).

actions.name: List Offers
actions.description: Returns job offers extended to candidates.

actions.name: Check Visa Requirements
actions.description: Returns whether a business traveler needs a visa to enter a destination country, and any business-visa options available.

actions.name: Get Visa Types
actions.description: Returns the visa types supported for working in a country.

actions.name: List Immigration Cases
actions.description: Returns the immigration cases (visa applications, right-to-work checks) tracked by Deel.

actions.name: Get Immigration Case
actions.description: Returns the full details of one immigration case, including required documents and status.

actions.name: Get Worker KYC
actions.description: Returns Know-Your-Customer (identity verification) details for a worker.

actions.name: Create Veriff Session
actions.description: Starts a Veriff video-based identity verification session for a worker. Returns a URL to send to the worker.

actions.name: List IT Orders
actions.description: Returns the IT equipment orders (laptops, monitors, etc.) provisioned through Deel.

actions.name: List IT Assets
actions.description: Returns IT assets (devices) currently issued to your workers.

actions.name: List IT Hardware Policies
actions.description: Returns the IT hardware policies (allowed device types, budgets) for your organization.

actions.name: Get Country Hiring Guide
actions.description: Returns Deel's Knowledge Hub country guide — covering taxes, benefits, mandatory leave, and compliance basics.

actions.name: Create Magic Link
actions.description: Generates a single-use login link a manager can use to access Deel without a password.

actions.name: List Invoices
actions.description: Returns the invoices (paid and unpaid) for your Deel account.

actions.name: Get Invoice
actions.description: Returns the full details of one invoice.

actions.name: Download Invoice PDF
actions.description: Returns a download URL for the invoice PDF.

actions.name: List Refund Statements
actions.description: Returns refund statements for invoices that have been credited back.

actions.name: List Managers
actions.description: Returns the managers configured in your Deel organization.

idealUseCases: Onboarding and offboarding workers across contractor, EOR, and direct-employee models
Syncing people, departments, and org-structure data between Deel and your HRIS or database
Automating time-off requests, approvals, validation, and balance checks
Adding bonuses, deductions, and reimbursements before payroll cycles close
Running global-payroll and EOR workflows (compensation, payslips, gross-to-net reports)
Driving recruiting flows through Deel's ATS (jobs, candidates, applications, offers)
Reacting in real time to Deel events such as signed contracts or available payslips
agentIdeas: When a **Deel** "On Deel Event" trigger fires for `eor.payslips.available`, use **Deel** "Download Payslip PDF" to fetch the document, then **Gmail** "Send Message" to email it to the employee.

When a **Recruitee** "On Status Change" trigger marks a candidate as hired, call **Deel** "Create Direct Employee" (or "Create EOR Contract") to provision the worker, then **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to notify the People Ops channel.

When a **Deel** "On Deel Event" trigger fires for `contract.signed`, use **Google Sheets** "Add Row" to log the new hire in an onboarding tracker and **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to announce it.
